name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food – Chicken 1.5kg
shortDescription: Give your cat the nourishment it deserves with Bonnie Adult Cat Food Chicken 1.5kg. This premium formula provides complete and balanced nutrition tailored for adult cats. Rich in quality chicken protein, it helps maintain lean muscle mass, promotes a shiny coat, and supports healthy digestion. Enhanced with essential vitamins and minerals, it also strengthens your cat’s immune system for everyday vitality.
description: Bonnie Chicken Adult Cat food , full-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Chicken meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding manna oligsacharrides , beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewer’s yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported, and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein……………….33% Fat ………………… 13% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)… 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein (Chicken), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Chicken Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer’s Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
